title: HistoricalVitalRecord
description: An index entry for a historical NYC vital record — birth, death, marriage certificate, or marriage license from the pre-1949 civil registers held by the Municipal Archives. Canonical schema reconciling the four DORIS 'Index to Digitized …' datasets: Death Certificates (797j-9xvg, 9c), Marriage Certificates (j62e-7maa, 8c), Birth Certificates (5gq7-rgmv, 8c), and Marriage Licenses (d8dr-nyhw, 3c). These are INDEXES only — the scanned certificate itself is served through the Historical Vital Records portal (a860-historicalvitalrecords.nyc.gov) and certified copies must be ordered.

recordType.description: Which vital-record index this entry comes from.

certificateNumber.description: Certificate or license number ('Certificate Number' / 'License Number').

ageOfDeath.description: Age at death ('Age of Death') — death certificates only.

eventDate.description: The record date, split into the day/month/year columns as published.
